zh.lifeSummary: 當Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes於1213年出生時，他的父親Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I48歲，母親Comtesse Pétronille de Comminges et de Bigorre33歲。他於1235年與Mabille de Montmorency-Marly結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1271年享年58歲，埋葬在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里三 洛倫佐 馬吉歐雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beynes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Baines  .

variants.name: Baines
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of the places in France called Bains, in either Ille-et-Vilaine or Maine-et-Loire, from Old French baine ‘bath’.
Scottish and northern English: variant of Bain or Bane , with excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Guglielmo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes was born in 1213, his father, Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, was 48 and his mother, Comtesse Pétronille de Comminges et de Bigorre, was 33. He married Mabille de Montmorency-Marly in 1235. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1271, at the age of 58, and was buried in San Lorenzo Maggiore, Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes est né en 1213, son père, Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Comtesse Pétronille de Comminges et de Bigorre, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Mabille de Montmorency-Marly en 1235. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1271, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à San Lorenzo Maggiore, Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italie.

Er hat 1235 Mabille de Montmorency-Marly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1271 im Alter von 58 Jahren und wurde in San Lorenzo Maggiore, Neapel, Napoli, Campania, Italien begraben.

Lui sposato Mabille de Montmorency-Marly nel 1235. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. ko.lifeSummary: Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes(이)가 1213년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Comtesse Pétronille de Comminges et de Bigorre(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1235년 Mabille de Montmorency-Marly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리 산 로렌초 매조어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes nasceu em 1213, seu pai, Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Comtesse Pétronille de Comminges et de Bigorre, tinha 33 anos. ru.San Lorenzo Maggiore, Napoli, Napoli, Ca: сан лорензо магиор, наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guglielmo I Stendardo de Beynes родился в 1213 г., его отцу по имени Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Comtesse Pétronille de Comminges et de Bigorre, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabille de Montmorency-Marly в 1235 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1271 г. в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности сан лорензо магиор, наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия.

Se casó con Mabille de Montmorency-Marly en 1235. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija.
